chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 151 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 03-11-2025 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State along with Inspector Asadullah >>>>>..<<<<< Compliance report filed by SDPO (City), Khairpur / Head of Joint Special Task Team, which is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar, Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, learned counsel for the Petitioner. The police officer present in Court submits that all the absconding accused persons nominated in FIR No.271 of 2013 under Section 302 PPC registered with Police Station ‘A’ Section, Khairpur have approached the concerned Court of law and obtained interim pre-arrest bail. Counsel holding brief submits that purpose of filing instant Petition has been served, therefore, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge ARBROHI/PS
